response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of fullstack experience, including recent production work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling development — a rare and explicitly required skill. Strong testing culture (TDD, test-library authorship, Selenium training) and cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) align well. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest experience, though adjacent skills (Java, Jest-style TDD, framework breadth) suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: Deep fullstack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience in production systems at scale
Direct AI-agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic frameworks
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being in the primary stack
Kotlin absent from skills; Java experience appears dated (pre-2018)
Vitest/Playwright not explicitly mentioned, though testing fundamentals are strong
